summary: Frontend regression testing after 3 bug fixes (Stagger reveal fix, ken-burns removal, per-page transitions). All targeted flows verified — brands page cards now visible on both direct load and client-side nav, Company hero image no longer animates, all page card grids render at opacity 1, home 3D + strengths + contact form still work.

issues: Form inputs lack data-testid attributes (name/email/phone/company/message/submit) — currently only accessible via placeholder text. Toast div also lacks a stable data-testid. Recommend adding data-testid="contact-{field}" and data-testid="contact-submit" for robust automation.
strength-* cards found via data-testid^=strength- but no explicit numbered ids referenced in request — worked fine, informational only.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to Contact form fields and submit button for reliable e2e automation.
Optionally expose data-testid="contact-success-toast" on the sonner success toast.
critical_code_review_comments: Reveal.jsx: Stagger keyed by Children.count works but is fragile — if children count is stable but data content changes, remount won't trigger. Consider passing an explicit `dataKey` prop (e.g., items.length or a version id) for correctness.
PageTransition wraps every page and uses `mode=wait` in AnimatePresence — fine, but exit animations can briefly delay incoming Reveal whileInView triggers. Current 0.55s duration is acceptable.
PageHero renders without width/height attributes → potential CLS. Consider adding aspect-ratio or intrinsic size.
seed_data_creation: None. Contact form submitted 1 test record via public API (TEST User / test@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: /brands direct + client-side nav (all 4 brand cards opacity=1), /services (6 cards), /company (4 stat cards, hero img has NO animation, class does NOT include ken-burns), /maintenance (3 expertise cards), /locations (leaflet map + 6 location cards), /home (canvas 3D + 5 strength cards on scroll), /contact form submits and shows 'Message sent!' toast. Preloader ~2.2s; use 3.5-4s wait after goto.
rca of the issue: Original bugs already fixed by main agent — RCA per problem statement: (1) Stagger's whileInView with once:true fired before async brand data arrived, leaving StaggerItems permanently at opacity 0. Fix: key Stagger by Children.count so it remounts when children arrive. Verified all 4 brand cards now render at opacity 1. (2) ken-burns class removed from PageHero — confirmed no animation on Company hero img. (3) 8 per-page transition variants active in App.js publicPages array — visually confirmed different transitions between navigations.
